item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-003","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response wakes up appropriately: it rejects “SPA is outdated” as a sufficient premise, asks for target-function constraints such as user paths, performance bottlenecks, SEO/social needs, ops constraints, and team capability, then gives a scoped migration process. It avoids the fail signal of immediately listing a migration checklist from the trend premise, and explicitly recommends against all-site SSR without proof of benefit."}
